understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' while avoiding landing on spike tiles, using up to 2 attempts per level with 50 steps each; solve puzzles by moving, interacting with gravity, and clicking removable tiles across progressively harder levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily horizontal (left/right) but can result in vertical repositioning due to DOWN gravity pulling the player (or falling after tile removal); CLICK removes specific clickable tiles to open paths or alter terrain; hazards like spikes instantly end the attempt if landed on; no explicit undo mechanic beyond level restart on failure; steps decrement with each action and gravity state persists until changed.
